name: Theme

aliases.name: ThemeColorSet
aliases.type: { background : Color.Color, foreground : Color.Color, aux : Color.Color }

aliases.name: ThemeColorSetValues
aliases.type: { foreground : String.String, foregroundWithAlpha : Basics.Float -> String.String, background : String.String, backgroundWithAlpha : Basics.Float -> String.String, aux : String.String, auxWithAlpha : Basics.Float -> String.String }

aliases.name: ThemeData
aliases.type: { fonts : Theme.ThemeFonts, base : Theme.ThemeColorSet, neutral : Theme.ThemeColorSet, primary : Theme.ThemeColorSet, secondary : Theme.ThemeColorSet, success : Theme.ThemeColorSet, warning : Theme.ThemeColorSet, danger : Theme.ThemeColorSet }

aliases.name: ThemeFonts
aliases.type: { heading : String.String, text : String.String, code : String.String }

aliases.name: ThemeProvider
aliases.type: { styles : Html.Html msg, provider : List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg }

values.name: classStrategy
values.comment: Uses the presence of a given CSS class in the element scope to decide between light and dark mode.

values.name: globalProvider
values.comment:
Used to provide a Theme globally. It will be applied to your `body` element and it will be available for use anywhere in your application.

    main : Html msg
    main =
        div []
            [ Theme.globalProvider lightTheme
            , p [ style "color" Theme.baseForeground ]
                [ text "I'm colored using the `base foreground` value!" ]
            ]

**Note**: You are still able to overwrite this Theme locally.

values.name: globalProviderWithDarkMode
values.comment:
Used to provide a Theme globally with a dark mode alternative. Themes will automatically switch based on the strategy condition.

    main : Html msg
    main =
        div []
            [ Theme.globalProviderWithDarkMode
                { light = lightTheme
                , dark = darkTheme
                , strategy = Theme.systemStrategy
                }
            , p [ style "color" Theme.baseForeground ]
                [ text "I'm colored using the `base foreground` value!" ]
            ]

**Note**: You are still able to overwrite this Theme locally.
values.type: { light : Theme.Theme, dark : Theme.Theme, strategy : Theme.DarkModeStrategy } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: optimizedProvider
values.comment:
myTheme =
        optimizedProvider theme

    body []
        [ myTheme.styles
        , myTheme.provider []
            [ ... ]
        ]

values.name: optimizedProviderWithDarkMode
values.type: { light : Theme.Theme, dark : Theme.Theme, strategy : Theme.DarkModeStrategy } -> Theme.ThemeProvider msg

values.name: provider
values.comment:
Used to propagate themes to an specific scope.

    main : Html msg
    main =
        div []
            [ Theme.globalProvider defaultTheme

            -- section using the default theme
            , section [] [ .. ]

            -- section using the orange theme
            , Theme.provider orangeTheme [] [ .. ]
            ]
values.type: Theme.Theme -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: providerWithDarkMode
values.comment:
Used to propagate themes to an specific scope with a dark mode alternative. Themes will automatically switch based on the strategy condition.

    main : Html msg
    main =
        div []
            [ Theme.globalProviderWithDarkMode
                { light = lightTheme
                , dark = darkTheme
                , strategy = Theme.systemStrategy
                }

            -- section using the default light or dark theme
            , section [] [ .. ]

            -- section using the orange light and dark themes
            , Theme.providerWithDarkMode
                { light = lightOrange
                , dark = darkOrange
                , strategy = Theme.systemStrategy
                }
                [] [ .. ]
            ]
values.type: { light : Theme.Theme, dark : Theme.Theme, strategy : Theme.DarkModeStrategy } -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: stylesIf
values.comment:
div
        [ stylesIf
            [ ( "background", Theme.baseBackground, True )
            , ( "color", Theme.primaryForeground, isPrimary )
            , ( "color", Theme.baseForeground, not isPrimary )
            ]
        ]
        []
values.type: List.List ( String.String, String.String, Basics.Bool ) -> Html.Attribute msg

values.name: systemStrategy
values.comment: Uses the user system settings to decide between light and dark mode.
